+91 78382 63460Get a Quote

The world's pantry, crafted in India.

Elfurat Spices delivers farm-to-fork purity at export scale - premium whole spices, cold-milled powders, master-blended masalas, aromatics, nuts and pantry staples for retail brands, HORECA and industrial food manufacturers in over 40 countries.

Explore the CatalogueRequest an Export Quote
40+
Export Countries
180+
SKUs in Catalogue
5
Certifications
24/7
B2B Support
Farm to Fork · Traceable

A supply chain obsessed with purity.

We control every touchpoint - from selecting farmer collectives across India's spice-growing belts, to precision cleaning, cold milling, in-house lab testing and export-grade packaging. Every lot ships with full traceability, certificates of analysis, and phytosanitary documentation.

Sourcing

Direct partnerships with 200+ farmer collectives.

Processing
HACCP-grade lines
Packaging
Lot-coded, sealed
Global Export
40+ countries, FCL & LCL ready
Compliance
APEDA · FSSAI · ISO · FDA · Spice Board of India

Eight categories. One promise.

Whole Spices

Hand-selected, sun-dried, and export-graded.

Elfurat Spices is a global exporter of premium Indian spices, aromatics, nuts and pantry staples - engineered for retail brands, HORECA and industrial food manufacturers worldwide.
